scope: Regression fixtures and temporary local rejection roots only; no active source root, planner behavior, or canary evidence was changed or claimed.

findings.textured_blank: A single corner background sample allowed gradient, grid, and deterministic-noise images to count as sprite coverage.
findings.promotion_provenance: Promotion compared pair IDs only and could raise while hashing absent release artifacts, leaving no controlled receipt.

corrections.render_semantics: Sprite coverage now derives contrast from its surrounding local background and rejects texture-only coverage.
corrections.rollout_gates: Selections freeze complete pairing rows; assessment validates manifest bytes and full pair identity, receipt hashes, prior receipt integrity, and prior artifact hashes.

verification.manual_missing_artifact_cli: assess exited rejected and wrote rollout_promotion_receipt.json with empty missing-artifact hashes and stable reasons
